title: How One Family Fooled the World into Buying Worthless Rocks
description:
Take a look at the single greatest marketing heist in human history: the De Beers diamond dynasty. For over a century, you, your parents, and your grandparents have been the silent victims of dynamic artificial scarcity. This is how they captured the human mind.

Subscribe to Corporate Shadows for more dark business scandals!

title: The Poisoned Formula: The Corporate Giant That Stole Africa's Markets
description:
In the 1970s, one food conglomerate launched a sales campaign so aggressive it led to thousands of infant deaths. This is the dark history of how they captured a continent.

title: The Secret Society That Controlled the World's Electricity
description:
In 1924, a group of powerful industrialists gathered in a smoke-filled room in Geneva. Their objective? Make lightbulbs burn out faster. This is the dark history of the Phoebus Cartel, planned obsolescence, and how they controlled the world's electricity.

title: The Billion-Dollar Poison: How America's Sweetest Brand Fooled a Generation
description:
For decades, the public was told that fat was the enemy. But behind the scenes, the sugar industry helped shape the science, the headlines, and the food choices of an entire generation. This is the dark history of how corporate influence rewired America's diet.

title: The Company That Literally Conquered India (and Went Bankrupt)
description:
It had its own army of 260,000 men. ..

This is the dark business history behind The rise and fall of the East India Company.
